creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: az
Date: Fri May 24 16:34:29 2013
New Revision: 318992
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/318992

Log:
  Add sysutils/cbsd, Yet another FreeBSD jail management tool.
  
  PR:		ports/176377
  Submitted by:	Oleg Ginzburg <olevole@olevole.ru>

Added:
  head/sysutils/cbsd/
  head/sysutils/cbsd/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/cbsd/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/cbsd/files/
  head/sysutils/cbsd/files/pkg-message.in   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/cbsd/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/cbsd/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/sysutils/Makefile

Modified: head/sysutils/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/Makefile	Fri May 24 16:21:46 2013	(r318991)
+++ head/sysutils/Makefile	Fri May 24 16:34:29 2013	(r318992)
@@ -92,6 +92,7 @@
     SUBDIR += busybox
     SUBDIR += busybox-unstable
     SUBDIR += byobu
+    SUBDIR += cbsd
     SUBDIR += ccd2iso
     SUBDIR += cciss_vol_status
     SUBDIR += ccze

Added: head/sysutils/cbsd/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/sysutils/cbsd/Makefile	Fri May 24 16:34:29 2013	(r318992)
@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	cbsd
+PORTVERSION=	9.2.0
+CATEGORIES=	sysutils
+MASTER_SITES=	http://www.bsdstore.ru/downloads/
+
+MAINTAINER=	olevole@olevole.ru
+COMMENT=	Yet another FreeBSD Jail Management Utility
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	rsync:${PORTSDIR}/net/rsync \
+		sudo:${PORTSDIR}/security/sudo \
+		sqlite3:${PORTSDIR}/databases/sqlite3
+LIB_DEPENDS=	ssh2:${PORTSDIR}/security/libssh2
+
+SUB_FILES=	pkg-message
+
+MAN7=		cbsd.7
+
+.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
+
+.if ${OSVERSION} < 901000
+IGNORE=	does not work on FreeBSD < 9.1
+.endif
+
+post-install:
+	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
+
+.include <bsd.port.post.mk>

Added: head/sysutils/cbsd/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/sysutils/cbsd/distinfo	Fri May 24 16:34:29 2013	(r318992)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (cbsd-9.2.0.tar.gz) = 745084b1085c974eca68ed94009e826e99a4f6f8c2638b052a89d9a20157195b
+SIZE (cbsd-9.2.0.tar.gz) = 1602579

Added: head/sysutils/cbsd/files/pkg-message.in
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/sysutils/cbsd/files/pkg-message.in	Fri May 24 16:34:29 2013	(r318992)
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+===============================================================================
+cbsd is now installed, but it requires some additional setup.
+
+****************************************************
+Please run: env workdir="/path" %%PREFIX%%/cbsd/sudoexec/initenv
+****************************************************
+
+Where /path is path for cbsd workdir, e.g.: /usr/jails
+
+=============================================================================

Added: head/sysutils/cbsd/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/sysutils/cbsd/pkg-descr	Fri May 24 16:34:29 2013	(r318992)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+Yet another FreeBSD jail management tool.
+
+WWW: http://www.bsdstore.ru/
